title: Legal Associate/ Senior Associate
description:
Firm Description

Covenant Chambers LLC is a trusted and tech-driven law firm, which focuses on commercial and property disputes and tech, media and IP. In recent years, the firm had expanded the legal services it offers to include capital markets, corporate and commercial matters. In 2025, asialaw described the firm’s corporate and M&A practice as “rapidly growing” and the firm’s capital markets team has also been described as “having demonstrated its ability to navigate complex regulatory requirements and facilitate successful fundraising exercises for clients”.

Job Description

We are looking to hire a Singapore-qualified Associate/ Senior Associate to join our Capital Markets/ Mergers & Acquisitions team.

The ideal candidate will have (a) worked on a range of corporate and/or capital markets transactions, including public and private mergers & acquisitions, private equity investments, IPOs, placements and rights issues; and (b) familiarity with SGX listing rules.

The role will also involve providing legal advisory on general commercial contracts and a broad range of transactions including placements, rights issues, continuing SGX listing requirements; corporate disclosure and corporate governance, capital and corporate restructuring, and employee share schemes.

Requirements

  • Singapore qualified lawyer with at least 2 to 6 years post-qualification experience.
  • Experience in general transactional and corporate matters.
  • Familiarity with SGX listing rules.
  • Sound foundation in legal knowledge, communication and drafting skills.
  • Possess initiative, drive and commercial acumen, and can work well both independently and in a team

Contact Information

If you possess the necessary skills and experience, please apply by sending your updated CV, educational certificates and transcripts to us at hr@covenantchambers.com. We also encourage submission of a cover letter to provide us more details of your background and to explain your interest in applying to our team.

We regret that only shortlisted candidates will be notified.

postedCompany.description:
Covenant Chambers LLC is a global legal team bringing transformative justice and bespoke solutions to every legal need. We are known for our client-centric, innovations and efficacious approach in providing workable legal solutions to their clients. 

We value our relationship with our clients and staff to be their trusted business partners and employers respectively - to always place their interest at the core of what we do. 

The firm continually adopts cutting-edge technology to improve workplace productivity to increase cost-savings for our clients and in our daily operations. 

We recognise and acknowlege the valuable experience that our older staff members bring to the firm and we make the effort to redesign their roles to enable them to perform at their best.

Covenant Chambers LLC continues to grow to become the leading law firm in Singapore for our dispute resolution, commercial and corporate work but also strives to become one of the best workplace to be employed at.
postedCompany.name: COVENANT CHAMBERS LLC

districts.location: D01 Cecil, Marina, People’s Park, Raffles Place
